name: Deep Research Report
description: Research a topic in depth and produce a detailed report

agents.name: Researcher
agents.purpose: Gather comprehensive information on the given topic
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the topic thoroughly. Find multiple sources, key facts, different perspectives, and recent developments.

agents.name: Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze gathered research and identify key insights
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the research data. Identify patterns, draw conclusions, and highlight the most important findings.

agents.name: Report Writer
agents.purpose: Write a structured, detailed report from the analysis
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a comprehensive report with an executive summary, key findings, detailed analysis, and recommendations.

suggestion_card.title: Deep Research
suggestion_card.subtitle: Get a detailed report on any topic
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Research [topic] and write a detailed report

author: agentfactory
